description: StarCaster by Alphire — multi-tenant platform for influencers and creators to establish web presence, promote content, and engage organically across social channels (comments, likes, shares, posts, articles, video).
primaryStack: React/TypeScript (components/ + lib/builder-client) for new UI; frozen vanilla JS SPA (public/js) for legacy admin screens
backend: Node.js (server.js local, Vercel serverless api/[...slug].js, shared dispatcher routes/index.js)
styling: CSS3 (src/css/ → public/styles.css via esbuild; no Tailwind)

keyDirectories.public: Built static assets; public/js is the FROZEN legacy vanilla-JS admin app
keyDirectories.src: HTML partials (pages/), CSS sources, layout.html — sources for generated public/ files
keyDirectories.components: React/TypeScript UI — the default for all new admin/builder UI
keyDirectories.routes: API route modules (shared dispatcher in routes/index.js)
keyDirectories.lib: Stores, Supabase access, config, project scoping; lib/builder-client is TS builder source
keyDirectories.scripts: Build, migrations, imports, convention checks, agent hooks

architecturalNotes: New UI defaults to React/TypeScript; public/js is end-of-life (bugfixes only). Generated files (app-shell.html, styles.css, bundles) are never hand-edited — see the table in CLAUDE.md. Enforcement: pre-commit runs scripts/check_conventions.cjs; Claude Code hooks block generated-file edits.
